comment: Airwindows-inspired custom tape echo for Zoom Multistomp. Uses ctx[3] for a bounded stereo delay line and compact mono spring tank, a FIR derived from a UAD Galaxy Tape Echo IR, TapeHack-style soft clipping, adjustable wear filtering, measured flutter/wow modulation, and a BPM+division tempo workflow. Hardware untested.

params.name: Tempo
params.comment: BPM source for synced delay times. Descriptor is marked with the stock tempo flag pattern; true tap-tempo host writes still need hardware proof.

params.name: Div
params.comment: Discrete musical division selector inside the DSP: 1/16, 1/8T, 1/8, dotted 1/8, 1/4, dotted 1/4.

params.name: Feed
params.comment: Feedback amount. Top of knob is firmly in self-oscillation territory; tape_saturate in the feedback path limits the runaway so it sustains rather than explodes.

params.name: Wear
params.comment: Adds aged-tape filtering around the fixed Galaxy-derived head/tape FIR response.

params.name: Drive
params.comment: TapeHack-style soft clipping into the record path.

params.name: Spring
params.comment: Experimental parallel mono spring-reverb return. Disabled by default while a closer Galaxy model is developed.
